sglang.title: Fix corrupted JSONL metrics file due to concurrent writes
sglang.author: talorabr
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When using sglang server with --export-metrics-to-file --export-metrics-to-file-dir /tmp/sglang-metrics, concurrent writes can corrupt the jsonl file of the metrics.
Example of corrupted jsonl file with 32 concurrent requests:

sglang.title: [Diffusion] Detect Flux2 custom VAE path from component_paths
sglang.author: ChangyiYang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
--vae-path is parsed as a dynamic component override and stored in component_paths["vae"].
For flux_2_t2i_customized_vae_path, pipeline selection in PipelineConfig.from_kwargs() only checked vae_path, so it missed the custom VAE case and did not switch to Flux2FinetunedPipelineConfig. Thi

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Fix flaky embedding chat test by using tolerance-based comparison
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt: tests/entrypoints/pooling/embed/test_online.py::test_chat_request fails intermittently because it compares embeddings from two separate requests using exact dict equality. This is more evident on MI355 ROCm signal. Separate forward passes can produce slightly different floating-point results due to

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Fix realtime test timeouts caused by aiter JIT compilation delays
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
test_multi_chunk_streaming and test_empty_commit_does_not_crash_engine in entrypoints/openai/test_realtime_validation.py (Entrypoints Integration Test - API Server 1) intermittently fail with TimeoutError on ROCm builds.
The root cause is that aiter modules are JIT-compiled on the first inference re

vllm.title: [Spec Decode] Defer clearing KV connector metadata for EAGLE3 speculative decode + prefill / decode disagg setup
vllm.author: zixi-qi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
…tive decoding

Purpose

When speculative decoding is enabled with disaggregated prefill/decode, clear_connector_metadata() was called after the target model forward but before the draft model forward. This caused has_connector_metadata() to return False during the draft model's attention layers, sk

vllm.title: [Bug] Refactor max_num_batched_tokens to account for drafting
vllm.author: benchislett
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Alternative bugfix to #34671. Solves a crash of specdec on main.
To solve the consistency issue, we directly modify max_num_batched_tokens when initializing the VllmConfig, and then decrease is specifically in the scheduler so that the scheduling behaviour is unchanged.
Testing
Tested with Q

vllm.title: [Model] Add NVFP4 quantization support for Step3.5-Flash
vllm.author: tacos8me
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Enable NVFP4 (FP4) quantized MoE inference for stepfun-ai/Step-3.5-Flash. This model uses a swiglustep activation (clipped SwiGLU with limit=7.0) on MoE layers 43-44, which was previously unsupported by all NVFP4 MoE backends.
A working NVFP4 quantized checkpoint is available at tacos4me/Ste

vllm.title: [Spec Decode] Reduce TP communication for speculative decoding draft token generation
vllm.author: zixi-qi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Reduce TP communication overhead in Eagle speculative decoding by replacing the all-gather of full vocabulary logits with a local argmax + gather reduction.
Problem
During draft token generation, Eagle speculative decoding all-gathers the full logits tensor across TP ranks — O(batch_size × v

vllm.title: [Model Runner V2] Remove propose_draft method
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: propose_draft is quite redundant. Just directly call self.speculator.propose.

vllm.title: [Refactor] Simplify dummy data generation
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose

Always pass the kwargs from MM config when constructing HF processor. This removes the need to pass them explicitly to dummy data generation (#34330)
Always pass a dictionary to mm_options, so there is no need for implementations to handle the case where it is None

Test Plan
Using the same
